title: Contact Katie — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent
h1: If there is anything you need me for, please get in touch : I’d love to help if I can.
meta_description: Get in touch with Katie Lam MP, Member of Parliament for the Weald of Kent.
text_excerpt: Contact Katie — Katie Lam for Weald of Kent 0 Skip to Content About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! Open Menu Close Menu About Katie Support Katie Clubs Contact Keep in touch! If there is anything you need me for, please get in touch : I’d love to help if I can. Please fill in this form which will come straight through to me. There are strict rules about supporting your constituents (and only your constituents!) which is why I need your address. I’ve also included some information on what I can help with, as well as what I unfortunately am not able to assist you with below. I should be able to help with any issues that involve Parliament and Government departments, such as the Department for Work and Pensions or the UK Immigration and Visa Service. I can also assist with issues that involve Kent County Council, or Ashford Borough Council; Maidstone Borough Council; or Tunbridge Wells Borough Council, but if the matter is related to planning, the best person to contact is your local Ward Member. You can find out who represents you on your local Borough Council here . If you are having a problem with a private company I will also do my best to help, but they are under no obligation to reply to my letters and emails. My team and I are unable to help you with filling in forms, such as to apply for benefits or housing ( but Citizens Advice can !) Also, I am unable to become directly involved in legal proceedings. All correspondence received by the Office of Katie Lam MP, is treated in line with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 2018. A copy of the office Privacy Notice is available online at www.katieforkent.com/privacy. Promoted by Katie Lam, of Tenterden Business Centre, Ashford Road, Tenterden TN30 6SP. Keep in touch! Keep in touch! Katie.Lam.MP@Parliament.uk
